Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm going out with a few ladies later, but I guess some of their friends want to talk with me first...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe we can all go together! Wouldn't that be so much more fun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think they're waiting for me on the roof. Want to come along?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji's invited me to join him. This might be a[n]good opportunity to get to know him better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school with Ryoji?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've got a meeting on the roof in a moment. Why don't you come along?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ryoji's invited me to join him. This might be a[n]good opportunity to get to know him better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school with Ryoji?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not very familiar with the people I'm meeting... Hopefully it isn't too awkward...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 155 -1 0 0}Yukari-san told me there's a riverbank nearby with a great view.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 155 -1 0 0}Would you like to check it out with me tomorrow?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend my free time[n]with Ryoji tomorrow...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14002 0 0}We shouldn't let this opportunity slip by. If you're up for it, let's go check it out tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 155 -1 0 0}It's really close by, too. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend my free time[n]with Ryoji tomorrow...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 155 -1 0 0}I'll come find you when we start heading back tomorrow. I'm looking forward to it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 155 -1 0 0}Well, let me know if you change your mind. I'd prefer to finalize my plans now, if possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14007 0 0}I'll come find you when we start heading back tomorrow. I hope it won't be too cold out.[n]{f 1 1}
